login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your CalDAV and CardDAV resources.
login.registerDisabled: Public sign-up is disabled by administrators.
login.remember: Stay signed in on this device

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Your default calendar and address book are generated automatically.
register.name: Name
register.pendingApprovalNotice: Registration submitted. An administrator must approve your account before you can sign in.
register.pendingVerificationNotice: Registration submitted. Verify your email address before signing in.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Verification
twoFactor.subtitle: Enter your 6-digit authenticator code or a backup code.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.subtitle: One moment while we confirm your email address.
verifyEmail.success: Email verified. You can now sign in to continue.
verifyEmail.error: Unable to verify this email link. Request a new one.

invite.title: Activate Account
invite.subtitle: Set a password to complete your invitation.
